description: AI-powered chat and generation interface using Gemini Flash with streaming support.

APP_NAME.description: Human-readable application name shown on the home screen and in navigation bars.

BUNDLE_ID.description: iOS bundle identifier in reverse-DNS format.

PRIMARY_COLOR.description: Hex color code for the brand accent used throughout the UI.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini Flash API key for AI-powered chat and generation.

TEAM_ID.description: Apple Developer Team ID for code signing.

SUPPORT_URL.description: URL shown in the Settings support link.

APPLE_APP_ID.description: Apple App Store numeric app ID for the rate app link.

PRIVACY_POLICY_URL.description: URL to the app's privacy policy.
